description: Letter from Musa b. Abi al-Hayy, from Alexandria, to Yosef b. Musa al-Tāhartī. Around 1045. The situation in Alexandria is very complicated. The writer mentions details about shipments of goods. Contains a copy of a receipt for goods that Alal b. Nahray b. Natan sent to Fustat. Mentions details about the process of weaving and bleaching linen. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #458) VMR
description_he: מכתב ממוסא בן אבי אל-חי, מאלכסנדריה, ליוסף בן מוסא אל-תהרתי, כ-1045, על מצב מורכב ומשלוחי פשתן
